items.title: Saline Township Board Meets July 8 at 7 p.m.
items.dek: Residents within 30 minutes of Saline Township Hall face potential effects from decisions at the July 8 board meeting. The Township Board meets on the second Wednesday of each month at 7:00 PM in the Saline Township Hall.
items.findings: The agenda page lists the July 8, 2026 Township Board meeting with no attached materials or staff reports | The packet shows consent agenda items including accounts payable and minutes | No project specifics appear in the July 8 agenda document
items.perspective: The update occurs under the regular meeting format with citizen comments and board member comments scheduled after the listed items.
